title: Jimmy Kimmel reveals he asked major Trump critic to guest host while he's on vacation as a 'special treat'
description: Jimmy Kimmel said Thursday he asked Rosie O'Donnell to guest host his late-night show as a "special treat" for Donald Trump during his two-month vacation.

title: ATP fines tennis player Corentin Moutet $40,000 for profane interview following HSBC Championships win
description: French tennis player Corentin Moutet fined $40,000 by the ATP for profane language during his post-match interview at the HSBC Championships.

title: Trump administration opens four Title IX investigations into Michigan and North Carolina school districts
description: The U.S. Department of Education opened four new Title IX investigations into Michigan and North Carolina schools districts over alleged violations.

title: Trump-Meloni spat grows over claim Italian PM 'begged' for photo: 'astonished'
description: Giorgia Meloni fires back at Trump after he claimed she "begged" for a photo, calling his statements "completely made up" following the G7 summit.

title: American League Central showdown: How to bet series opener between White Sox and Tigers
description: The Chicago White Sox lead the AL Central at 39-34 while facing Tarik Skubal and the Tigers in a matchup with under 8 runs as the betting pick.

title: SEE IT: Dem senator downplays security threat of illegal immigration after White House terror plot
description: Sen. Maria Cantwell declined to directly condemn illegal immigration as a national security threat after an alleged terror plot targeting the White House.

title: Maine Democrats reject Platner-backed candidate in blow to scandal-plagued Senate hopeful
description: Hannah Pingree, the former speaker of the Maine House of Representatives, wins Maine's 2026 Democratic gubernatorial primary, defeating Troy Jackson and a crowded field of challengers.

title: Freddy, the viral World Cup tourist, links up with country singer Ella Langley and the internet loves it
description: World Cup sensation Freddy attended an Ella Langley concert in Oklahoma City, meeting the country star in a viral moment making waves online.
